credentialRequirements.name: BOT_TOKEN
credentialRequirements.description: Bot platform authentication token (e.g. Slack bot token, Discord bot token)

credentialRequirements.name: BOT_WEBHOOK_SECRET
credentialRequirements.description: Shared secret for webhook signature verification

credentialRequirements.name: WORKER_DEPLOY_TOKEN
credentialRequirements.description: Worker runtime deploy token (e.g. Cloudflare Workers API token, Fly.io token)

approvalGate.blockedReason: Bot deployment requires BOT_TOKEN, BOT_WEBHOOK_SECRET, and WORKER_DEPLOY_TOKEN. No credentials supplied in proof pass.
requiredUserActions: Supply BOT_WEBHOOK_SECRET for webhook signature verification
Register webhook endpoint with bot platform after deploy

providerAdapters.commandTemplate: wrangler deploy --env production (or equivalent worker deploy command)

secretPolicyChecks.description: No .env files with real credential values committed to source
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No committed .env files with real credential values detected for bot

secretPolicyChecks.description: Environment variable manifest (.env.example or app.config.json) is present
All required credentials declare mustNotBeCommitted=true for secrets
secretPolicyChecks.detail: mustNotBeCommitted=true is declared for all secret-class credentials in the credential manifest.

secretPolicyChecks.description: No hardcoded secret patterns (API keys, JWT tokens, AWS keys) found in source files
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No hardcoded secret patterns detected in bot source files

caveat: This manifest declares credential requirements for approved credentialed deployment. No credentials are stored, validated, or used in this proof pass. Live deployment is blocked by default and requires explicit user approval and user-supplied credentials.
